title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Croma Holdings Services - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Croma Holdings Services - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Croma Holdings Services, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Digital Marketing Manager for our Bhubaneswar operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Croma Holdings Services:
Croma Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Croma Holdings Services!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
